# Files that must NOT be copied to target repositories.
# One path per line, relative to the repository root.
# Blank lines and comments are ignored.

README.md
LICENSE.md
.github/sync-targets.txt
.github/sync-exceptions.txt
.github/workflows/sync.yml
.github/scripts/sync-list-targets.sh
.github/scripts/sync-files.sh
.github/scripts/sync-commit-pr.sh
